invariant_definitions.INV_MEN_001: Every recorded discovery must name gene/protein target AND hardware pillar (transport | lactate | denitrification).
invariant_definitions.INV_MEN_002: No closure on invasive efficacy without documented assay tier: in_vitro | ex_vivo_blood | animal.
invariant_definitions.INV_MEN_003: Serogroup-agnostic claims must cite conservation evidence (locus/region), not capsule serotype alone.
invariant_definitions.UUM-GREATOWL-001: Energy / entropy-delta audit (3.82e-20 J framing): resonant synchrony; prune uncontrolled waste-heat / Sulphur collateral pathways in audit.
invariant_definitions.UUM-GREATOWL-002: 1N bio-reference: phase-lock to individual biological ledger; selectivity vs human homologs; refuse collateral damage to sovereign bio-integrity.
invariant_definitions.UUM-GREATOWL-003: S4xC4 manifold closure: serogroup-agnostic claims cite IHT-A1 hardware coordinate; prune 4D drift costume-only (PorA/Opa) without hardware root.
invariant_definitions.UUM-GREATOWL-004: Sovereign TTL: detection + response in deterministic local-substrate window; void cloud-only gate for this closure class.

constraints_template: Evidence via GaiaFTCL-controlled paths only (MCP ingest). GxP where applicable. assumption_class required: HYPOTHESIS | DEMONSTRATED. FoT/confidence only with tiered assay receipts. Lab safe. Full disclosure.
